name: Varmland County (Sweden)

colors.symbolism: the silver field of the Varmland arms

description: A square silver flag charged centrally with a blue eagle displayed, the historic emblem of Varmland.
history: The flag is the heraldic banner of the arms of Varmland County, derived from the medieval coat of arms of the historic province of Varmland.

features.symbolism: the silver field of the historic Varmland provincial arms
an azure eagle displayed on a silver field, the historic emblem of the province of Varmland.
